reference: HE WAS QUICKER TO TAKE A HINT THAN SHE HAD EXPECTED AND BEING BOTH PROUD AND GENEROUS RESOLVED TO SETTLE THE MATTER AT ONCE FOR POLLY'S SAKE AS WELL AS HIS OWN
text: He was quicker to take a hint than she had expected, and being both proud and generous, we sought to settle the matter at once for Polly's sake as well as his own.
